creator: gmm@tutanota.com
text:
Created attachment 200776
Patch for py-pybloom upgrade

An upgrade is needed so that py-pybloom can be built in the py36 flavor. Jay Baird's py-pybloom 2.0 is no longer actively supported. Joseph Fox's fork brings this package to version 3.0.0 which is now the current release version of py-pybloom.
